title: assertion fault on WITHOUT ROWID query using the OR optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c DOUBLE PRECISION, PRIMARY KEY(a, b));
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c) VALUES(1, 'X', 1.1);
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c) VALUES(2, 'Y', 2.2);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE (b = 'X' AND a < 3) OR (c IS NULL AND a = 2);
key_bug_features: OR optimization on WITHOUT ROWID tables in WHERE clause
